title: Crabbed.
content:
A college professor one day
        Was fishing in Chesapeake Bay;
     Said a crab to his mate,
        "Let's kick off the bait,
     This business is too old to pay."
meaning:
Edwin C. Ranck's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Crabbed."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
